hero.headline: Clean web interfaces, reliable services and practical automation.
hero.lead: I help turn product ideas into working systems with clear structure, sensible defaults and deployment-ready execution.

steps.flow: connect API boundaries with data flow

about.paragraphOne: I'm Karol, a Full-Stack Web Developer from Poland with commercial experience in building web applications, backend APIs and automation tools.
about.paragraphTwo: I work across frontend implementation, API design, database models, workflow automation and deployment. My focus is software that is maintainable, useful and reliable.

stack.description: Interfaces, services, data and deployment paths into one working product flow.
stack.label: stack
stack.title: What I usually connect

projects.description: A compact set of work types I like building: product interfaces, APIs, automation and deployment-focused tools.

apiToolkit.description: Backend utilities for integrating APIs, automating workflows and processing structured data. Built around predictable jobs, practical logging and small composable service modules.
apiToolkit.label: backend / integration
apiToolkit.name: API Automation Toolkit

deploymentDashboard.description: Operational interface for monitoring application services, environments and deployment status. Focused on clear service state, deployment confidence and repeatable maintenance work.
deploymentDashboard.label: ops / monitoring
deploymentDashboard.name: Deployment Dashboard

portfolio.description: Personal portfolio built with Nuxt, Tailwind CSS and reusable content sections. Designed as a focused technical profile with terminal-inspired sections and fast iteration paths.
portfolio.label: interface / content system
portfolio.name: Portfolio v2

projects.repoDescription: Public links where possible. Private work is marked directly.
projects.title: Selected builds with practical constraints

automation.description: Workflow automation, scripts, background jobs and deployment paths for Linux and Docker environments.
automation.title: Automation & Deployment

backend.description: Service architecture, API contracts, authentication flows and database models for production web applications.
backend.title: Backend & APIs

frontend.description: Responsive interfaces, component systems and data-heavy screens built with practical state and API boundaries.
frontend.title: Frontend Engineering

build.description: Implement the interface, API and persistence with small, reviewable pieces.
build.name: Build

deploy.description: Package, deploy and leave the system observable enough to maintain.
